description: Synthetic diagram fixtures for ADR-0005 D8. No real workplace photos, people, faces, locations, EXIF, GPS, or company data.

fixtures.prompt: This is a synthetic Safety Secretary diagram, not a real workplace photo. Assess the visible cue for SUVA category MECHANICAL. Return JSON with hazards, categoryCode, confidence, and reviewNote.

expectedShape.humanReviewNote: Reviewer checks whether the model describes only synthetic cues and avoids inventing real incident facts.
